Display name:${safeDisplayName}, Username: ${safeUsername}, Bio: ${safeBio}">\n        <h3>${displayNameHighlighted}</h3>\n        <p class="meta">@${usernameHighlighted}</p>\n        ${badges ? `<div class="badgeContainer">${badges}</div>` : ""}\n        ${bioHighlighted ? `<p class="bio">${bioHighlighted}</p>` : ""}\n        <div class="user-actions">\n          <a href="${safeProfileUrl}" aria-label="${safeDisplayName}\'s profile">View Profile</a>\n        </div>\n      </article>\n    `;\n  }\n\n  function appendSection(panel, label, users, query, tab) {\n    if (!users.length) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (label) {\n      const sectionLabel = document.createElement("p");\n      sectionLabel.className = "label searchLabel";\n      sectionLabel.textContent = label;\n      panel.appendChild(sectionLabel);\n    }\n\n    const userListContainer = document.createElement("div");\n    userListContainer.className = "user-list";\n    userListContainer.innerHTML = users.map((user) => buildUserCard(user, query, tab)).join("");\n    panel.appendChild(userListContainer);\n  }\n\n  function renderPanelContent(\n    panel,\n    users,\n    query,\n    tab,\n    { introMarkup = "", showEmptyMessage = true } = {},\n  ) {\n    panel.innerHTML = introMarkup;\n\n    if (users.length === 0) {\n      if (showEmptyMessage) {\n        panel.insertAdjacentHTML(\n          "beforeend",\n          \'<p class="empty-message"><span class="emoji-message">🫥</span><br>No users found.</p>\',\n        );\n      }\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const realUsers = users.filter(\n      (user) =>\n        !user.is_public_record &&\n        !user.is_globaleaks &&\n        !user.is_newsroom &&\n        !user.is_securedrop,\n    );\n    const withPgp = realUsers.filter((user) => user.has_pgp_key);\n    const infoOnly = realUsers.filter((user) => !user.has_pgp_key);\n\n    if (tab === "all") {\n      appendSection(panel, "", sortAllTabUsers(users), query, tab);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === "verified") {\n      appendSection(panel, "", withPgp, query, tab);\n      appendSection(panel, "📇 Info-Only Accounts", infoOnly, query, tab);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    appendSection(panel, "", users, query, tab);\n  }\n\n  function displayUsers(users, query) {\n    const panel = activePanel();\n    const tab = activeTabName();\n    if (!panel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    renderPanelContent(panel, users, query, tab);\n  }\n\n  function panelIntroMarkup(panelId) {\n    return document.getElementById(panelId)?.querySelector(".dirMeta")?.outerHTML || "";\n  }\n\n  function buildDefaultPanelMarkup(tab) {\n    const panel = document.createElement("div");\n    const introMarkup = panelIntroMarkup(tab);\n    const showEmptyMessage = tab !== "public-records";\n\n    renderPanelContent(panel, filterUsers("", tab), "", tab, {\n      introMarkup,\n      showEmptyMessage,\n    });\n\n    return panel.innerHTML;\n  }\n\n  function refreshInitialMarkup() {\n    ["public-records", "newsrooms", "all"].forEach((panelId) => {\n      if (document.getElementById(panelId)) {\n        initialMarkup.set(panelId, buildDefaultPanelMarkup(panelId));\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  function handleSearchInput() {\n    const query = searchInput.value.trim();\n    const panel = activePanel();\n    const currentScopeLabel = scopeLabel();\n    const hasQuery = query.length > 0;\n\n    if (clearIcon) {\n      clearIcon.style.visibility = hasQuery ? "visible" : "hidden";\n      clearIcon.hidden = !hasQuery;\n      clearIcon.setAttribute("aria-hidden", hasQuery ? "false" : "true");\n    }\n\n    if (query.length === 0) {\n      if (panel && initialMarkup.has(panel.id)) {\n        panel.innerHTML = initialMarkup.get(panel.id);\n      }\n      if (hasRenderedSearch) {\n        setSearchStatus(`Showing all ${currentScopeLabel}.`);\n      }\n      hasRenderedSearch = false;\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const filteredUsers = filterUsers(query);\n    displayUsers(filteredUsers, query);\n    setSearchStatus(\n      filteredUsers.length === 1\n        ? `Found 1 ${currentScopeLabel.slice(0, -1)} matching "${query}".`\n        : `Found ${filteredUsers.length} ${currentScopeLabel} matching "${query}".`,\n    );\n    hasRenderedSearch = true;\n  }\n\n  function removeSearchParams(search, paramNames) {\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(search);\n    paramNames.forEach((paramName) => {\n      params.delete(paramName);\n    });\n    const nextSearch = params.toString();\n    return nextSearch ? `?${nextSearch}` : "";\n  }\n\n  function sharedDirectorySearch(search) {\n    return removeSearchParams(search, ["all_country", "all_region", "all_listing_type"]);\n  }\n\n  function allTabDirectorySearch(search) {\n    return removeSearchParams(search, [\n      "country",\n      "region",\n      "newsroom_country",\n      "newsroom_region",\n    ]);\n  }\n\n  function createLocationFilterController(config) {\n    const controller = {\n      ...config,\n      loading: false,\n      metadata: { countries: [], regions: {} },\n      metadataRequest: null,\n    };\n\n    if (!controller.countryFilter || !controller.regionFilter) {\n      return null;\n    }\n\n    controller.hasActiveFilters = function () {\n      return Boolean(\n        controller.countryFilter.value.trim() ||\n          controller.regionFilter.value.trim() ||\n          controller.listingTypeFilter?.value.trim(),\n      );\n    };\n\n    controller.updateToggle = function () {\n      if (!controller.toggle || !controller.panel) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const isExpanded = !controller.panel.hidden;\n      controller.toggle.setAttribute("aria-expanded", isExpanded ? "true" : "false");\n      controller.toggle.textContent = isExpanded ? "Hide Filters" : "Show Filters";\n    };\n\n    controller.updateVisibility = function () {\n      const tabIsActive = activeTabName() === controller.tabName;\n\n      if (controller.toggleShell) {\n        controller.toggleShell.hidden = !tabIsActive;\n      }\n\n      if (controller.panelShell) {\n        controller.panelShell.hidden = !tabIsActive;\n      }\n    };\n\n    controller.resultsCount = function () {\n      return filterUsers("", controller.tabName).length;\n    };\n\n    controller.updateCountBadge = function () {\n      if (controller.countBadge) {\n        controller.countBadge.textContent = controller.resultsCount().toString();\n      }\n    };\n\n    controller.buildSearch = function () {\n      const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\n      const country = controller.countryFilter.value.trim();\n      const region = controller.regionFilter.value.trim();\n\n      if (country) {\n        params.set(controller.countryParam, country);\n      } else {\n        params.delete(controller.countryParam);\n      }\n\n      if (region) {\n        params.set(controller.regionParam, region);\n      } else {\n        params.delete(controller.regionParam);\n      }\n\n      if (controller.listingTypeParam) {\n        const listingType = controller.listingTypeFilter?.value.trim() || "";\n        if (listingType) {\n          params.set(controller.listingTypeParam, listingType);\n        } else {\n          params.delete(controller.listingTypeParam);\n        }\n      }\n\n      const nextSearch = params.toString();\n      return nextSearch ? `?${nextSearch}` : "";\n    };\n\n    controller.setSelectExpandedState = function (select, isExpanded) {\n      if (!select) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      select.dataset.showSelectedCount = isExpanded ? "true" : "false";\n    };\n\n    controller.setSelectOpenState = function (select, isOpen) {\n      if (!select) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      select.classList.toggle("select-open", isOpen);\n    };\n\n    controller.updateClearVisibility = function () {\n      if (!controller.panel) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const resetActions = controller.panel.querySelector(`#${controller.actionsId}`);\n      if (!resetActions) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      resetActions.hidden = !controller.hasActiveFilters();\n    };\n\n    controller.updateCountryLabels = function () {\n      const selectedCountry = controller.countryFilter.value;\n      const showSelectedCount = controller.countryFilter.dataset.showSelectedCount === "true";\n\n      Array.from(controller.countryFilter.options).forEach((option) => {\n        if (!option.value) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        const country = Array.isArray(controller.metadata.countries)\n          ? controller.metadata.countries.find((item) => item.code === option.value)\n          : null;\n        if (!country) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        option.textContent =\n          option.value === selectedCountry && !showSelectedCount\n            ? country.label\n            : `${country.label} (${country.count})`;\n      });\n    };\n\n    controller.updateListingTypeLabels = function () {\n      if (!controller.listingTypeFilter) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const selectedListingType = controller.listingTypeFilter.value;\n      const showSelectedCount = controller.listingTypeFilter.dataset.showSelectedCount === "true";\n\n      Array.from(controller.listingTypeFilter.options).forEach((option) => {\n        if (!option.value) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        const listingType = Array.isArray(controller.metadata.listing_types)\n          ? controller.metadata.listing_types.find((item) => item.code === option.value)\n          : null;\n        if (!listingType) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        option.textContent =\n          option.value === selectedListingType && !showSelectedCount\n            ? listingType.label\n            : `${listingType.label} (${listingType.count})`;\n      });\n    };\n\n    controller.inferredCountryForRegionCode = function (regionCode) {\n      if (!regionCode) {\n        return "";\n      }\n\n      const normalizedRegionCode = regionCode.trim().toLowerCase();\n      const regionsByCountry =\n        controller.metadata.regions && typeof controller.metadata.regions === "object"\n          ? controller.metadata.regions\n          : {};\n\n      for (const [countryName, countryRegions] of Object.entries(regionsByCountry)) {\n        if (!Array.isArray(countryRegions)) {\n          continue;\n        }\n\n        const matchingRegion = countryRegions.find(\n          (region) => String(region.code).trim().toLowerCase() === normalizedRegionCode,\n        );\n        if (matchingRegion) {\n          return countryName;\n        }\n      }\n\n      return "";\n    };\n\n    controller.updateRegionOptions = function () {\n      const selectedCountry = controller.countryFilter.value;\n      const selectedRegion = controller.regionFilter.value;\n      const showSelectedCount = controller.regionFilter.dataset.showSelectedCount === "true";\n      const regionsByCountry =\n        controller.metadata.regions && typeof controller.metadata.regions === "object"\n          ? controller.metadata.regions\n          : {};\n      const availableRegions = selectedCountry\n        ? Array.isArray(regionsByCountry[selectedCountry])\n          ? regionsByCountry[selectedCountry]\n          : []\n        : Object.values(regionsByCountry).flatMap((countryRegions) =>\n            Array.isArray(countryRegions) ? countryRegions : [],\n          );\n\n      controller.regionFilter.innerHTML = \'<option value="">All</option>\';\n\n      if (selectedCountry) {\n        availableRegions.forEach((region) => {\n          const option = document.createElement("option");\n          option.value = region.code;\n          option.textContent =\n            region.code === selectedRegion && !showSelectedCount\n              ? region.label\n              : `${region.label} (${region.count})`;\n          if (region.code === selectedRegion) {\n            option.selected = true;\n          }\n          controller.regionFilter.appendChild(option);\n        });\n      } else {\n        Object.entries(regionsByCountry).forEach(([countryName, countryRegions]) => {\n          if (!Array.isArray(countryRegions) || !countryRegions.length) {\n            return;\n          }\n\n          const optgroup = document.createElement("optgroup");\n          optgroup.label = countryName;\n\n          countryRegions.forEach((region) => {\n            const option = document.createElement("option");\n            option.value = region.code;\n            option.textContent =\n              region.code === selectedRegion && !showSelectedCount\n                ? region.label\n                : `${region.label} (${region.count})`;\n            if (region.code === selectedRegion) {\n              option.selected = true;\n            }\n            optgroup.appendChild(option);\n          });\n\n          controller.regionFilter.appendChild(optgroup);\n        });\n      }\n\n      if (!availableRegions.some((region) => region.code === selectedRegion)) {\n        controller.regionFilter.value = "";\n      }\n\n      const disabledByCountry = !availableRegions.length;\n      controller.regionFilter.dataset.disabledByCountry = disabledByCountry ? "true" : "false";\n      controller.regionFilter.disabled = controller.loading || disabledByCountry;\n      controller.updateClearVisibility();\n    };\n\n    controller.updateSelectExpandedLabels = function (isExpanded) {\n      controller.setSelectExpandedState(controller.countryFilter, isExpanded);\n      controller.setSelectExpandedState(controller.regionFilter, isExpanded);\n      controller.setSelectExpandedState(controller.listingTypeFilter, isExpanded);\n      controller.updateCountryLabels();\n      controller.updateRegionOptions();\n      controller.updateListingTypeLabels();\n    };\n\n    controller.applyFromSearch = function (search) {\n      const params = new URLSearchParams(search);\n      controller.countryFilter.value = normalizedCountryFilterValue(\n        params.get(controller.countryParam),\n      );\n      controller.regionFilter.value = params.get(controller.regionParam) || "";\n      if (controller.listingTypeFilter && controller.listingTypeParam) {\n        controller.listingTypeFilter.value = params.get(controller.listingTypeParam) || "";\n      }\n      if (!controller.countryFilter.value && controller.regionFilter.value) {\n        controller.countryFilter.value = controller.inferredCountryForRegionCode(\n          controller.regionFilter.value,\n        );\n      }\n      controller.updateCountryLabels();\n      controller.updateRegionOptions();\n      controller.updateListingTypeLabels();\n\n      if (controller.panel) {\n        controller.panel.hidden = !controller.hasActiveFilters();\n        controller.updateToggle();\n        controller.updateClearVisibility();\n      }\n    };\n\n    controller.setLoadingState = function (isLoading) {\n      if (!controller.panel) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      controller.loading = isLoading;\n      controller.panel.setAttribute("aria-busy", isLoading ? "true" : "false");\n      controller.countryFilter.disabled = isLoading;\n\n      const disabledByCountry = controller.regionFilter.dataset.disabledByCountry === "true";\n      controller.regionFilter.disabled = isLoading || disabledByCountry;\n      if (controller.listingTypeFilter) {\n        controller.listingTypeFilter.disabled = isLoading;\n      }\n\n      const resetLink = controller.panel.querySelector("a");\n      if (resetLink) {\n        resetLink.setAttribute("aria-disabled", isLoading ? "true" : "false");\n        resetLink.tabIndex = isLoading ? -1 : 0;\n      }\n    };\n\n    controller.ensureMetadata = function () {\n      if (controller.metadataRequest) {\n        return controller.metadataRequest;\n      }\n\n      controller.metadataRequest = fetch(`${directoryPath}/${controller.metadataPath}`)\n        .then((response) => {\n          if (!response.ok) {\n            throw new Error("Network response was not ok");\n          }\n          return response.json();\n        })\n        .then((data) => {\n          controller.metadata = data;\n          controller.applyFromSearch(window.location.search);\n          return data;\n        })\n        .catch((error) => {\n          controller.metadataRequest = null;\n          console.error(`Failed to load ${controller.resultsLabelPlural} filter metadata:`, error);\n          return null;\n        });\n\n      return controller.metadataRequest;\n    };\n\n    controller.refreshResults = async function () {\n      if (!controller.panel) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const nextSearch = controller.buildSearch();\n      if (controller.loading || loadedDirectorySearch === nextSearch) {\n        return;\n      }\n      setSearchStatus(`Updating ${controller.resultsLabelPlural} results.`);\n      setDirectoryUrl(nextSearch);\n\n      try {\n        await requestDirectoryData(nextSearch, { loadingController: controller });\n        if (!searchInput.value.trim()) {\n          const count = controller.resultsCount();\n          setSearchStatus(\n            count === 1\n              ? `Showing 1 matching ${controller.resultsLabelSingular}.`\n              : `Showing ${count} matching ${controller.resultsLabelPlural}.`,\n          );\n        }\n      } catch (error) {\n        if (error.name === "AbortError") {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        setDirectoryUrl(loadedDirectorySearch);\n        controller.applyFromSearch(loadedDirectorySearch);\n        setSearchStatus(`Unable to update ${controller.resultsLabelPlural} results.`);\n        console.error(`Failed to update ${controller.resultsLabelPlural} results:`, error);\n      }\n    };\n\n    controller.bindEvents = function () {\n      if (controller.toggle && controller.panel) {\n        controller.updateToggle();\n        controller.toggle.addEventListener("click", function () {\n          controller.panel.hidden = !controller.panel.hidden;\n          controller.updateToggle();\n        });\n      }\n\n      if (!controller.panel) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const resetLink = controller.panel.querySelector("a");\n      const syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen = function (event) {\n        if (\n          event.type === "keydown" &&\n          event.key !== "ArrowDown" &&\n          event.key !== "ArrowUp" &&\n          event.key !== "Enter" &&\n          event.key !== " "\n        ) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        controller.updateSelectExpandedLabels(true);\n      };\n      const syncExpandedLabelsOnClose = function () {\n        controller.updateSelectExpandedLabels(false);\n      };\n      const syncChevronOnOpen = function (event) {\n        if (\n          event.type === "keydown" &&\n          event.key !== "ArrowDown" &&\n          event.key !== "ArrowUp" &&\n          event.key !== "Enter" &&\n          event.key !== " "\n        ) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        controller.setSelectOpenState(event.currentTarget, true);\n      };\n      const syncChevronOnClose = function (event) {\n        controller.setSelectOpenState(event.currentTarget, false);\n      };\n\n      controller.countryFilter.addEventListener("change", async function () {\n        await controller.ensureMetadata();\n        controller.updateCountryLabels();\n        controller.updateRegionOptions();\n        syncExpandedLabelsOnClose();\n        controller.setSelectOpenState(controller.countryFilter, false);\n        void controller.refreshResults();\n      });\n\n      controller.regionFilter.addEventListener("change", function () {\n        if (!controller.countryFilter.value && controller.regionFilter.value) {\n          controller.countryFilter.value = controller.inferredCountryForRegionCode(\n            controller.regionFilter.value,\n          );\n          controller.updateRegionOptions();\n        }\n        controller.updateCountryLabels();\n        controller.updateClearVisibility();\n        syncExpandedLabelsOnClose();\n        controller.setSelectOpenState(controller.regionFilter, false);\n        void controller.refreshResults();\n      });\n\n      if (controller.listingTypeFilter) {\n        controller.listingTypeFilter.addEventListener("change", async function () {\n          await controller.ensureMetadata();\n          controller.updateListingTypeLabels();\n          controller.updateClearVisibility();\n          syncExpandedLabelsOnClose();\n          controller.setSelectOpenState(controller.listingTypeFilter, false);\n          void controller.refreshResults();\n        });\n      }\n\n      [controller.countryFilter, controller.regionFilter, controller.listingTypeFilter]\n        .filter(Boolean)\n        .forEach((select) => {\n          select.addEventListener("focus", syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen);\n          select.addEventListener("pointerdown", syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen);\n          select.addEventListener("keydown", syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen);\n          select.addEventListener("blur", syncExpandedLabelsOnClose);\n          select.addEventListener("pointerdown", syncChevronOnOpen);\n          select.addEventListener("keydown", syncChevronOnOpen);\n          select.addEventListener("blur", syncChevronOnClose);\n        });\n\n      if (resetLink) {\n        resetLink.addEventListener("click", function (event) {\n          event.preventDefault();\n          if (controller.loading) {\n            return;\n          }\n\n          controller.countryFilter.value = "";\n          controller.regionFilter.value = "";\n          if (controller.listingTypeFilter) {\n            controller.listingTypeFilter.value = "";\n          }\n          controller.updateCountryLabels();\n          controller.updateRegionOptions();\n          controller.updateListingTypeLabels();\n          syncExpandedLabelsOnClose();\n          void controller.refreshResults();\n        });\n      }\n    };\n\n    return controller;\n  }\n\n  const locationFilterControllers = [\n    createLocationFilterController({\n      tabName: "all",\n      toggleShell: allFiltersToggleShell,\n      panelShell: allFiltersPanelShell,\n      toggle: allFiltersToggle,\n      panel: allFiltersPanel,\n      countryFilter: allCountryFilter,\n      regionFilter: allRegionFilter,\n      listingTypeFilter: allListingTypeFilter,\n      actionsId: "all-filters-actions",\n      metadataPath: "all-filters.json",\n      countryParam: "all_country",\n      regionParam: "all_region",\n      listingTypeParam: "all_listing_type",\n      resultsLabelSingular: "directory entry",\n      resultsLabelPlural: "directory entries",\n    }),\n    createLocationFilterController({\n      tabName: "public-records",\n      countBadge: publicRecordCountBadge,\n      toggleShell: attorneyFiltersToggleShell,\n      panelShell: attorneyFiltersPanelShell,\n      toggle: attorneyFiltersToggle,\n      panel: attorneyFiltersPanel,\n      countryFilter: attorneyCountryFilter,\n      regionFilter: attorneyRegionFilter,\n      actionsId: "attorney-filters-actions",\n      metadataPath: "attorney-filters.json",\n      countryParam: "country",\n      regionParam: "region",\n      resultsLabelSingular: "attorney",\n      resultsLabelPlural: "attorneys",\n    }),\n    createLocationFilterController({\n      tabName: "newsrooms",\n      countBadge: newsroomCountBadge,\n      toggleShell: newsroomFiltersToggleShell,\n      panelShell: newsroomFiltersPanelShell,\n      toggle: newsroomFiltersToggle,\n      panel: newsroomFiltersPanel,\n      countryFilter: newsroomCountryFilter,\n      regionFilter: newsroomRegionFilter,\n      actionsId: "newsroom-filters-actions",\n      metadataPath: "newsroom-filters.json",\n      countryParam: "newsroom_country",\n      regionParam: "newsroom_region",\n      resultsLabelSingular: "newsroom",\n      resultsLabelPlural: "newsrooms",\n    }),\n  ].filter(Boolean);\n\n  function updateLocationFilterVisibility() {\n    locationFilterControllers.forEach((controller) => {\n      controller.updateVisibility();\n    });\n  }\n\n  function updateLocationFilterCountBadges() {\n    locationFilterControllers.forEach((controller) => {\n      controller.updateCountBadge();\n    });\n  }\n\n  function setDirectoryUrl(search) {\n    window.history.replaceState(\n      {},\n      "",\n      `${window.location.pathname}${search}${window.location.hash}`,\n    );\n  }\n\n  function loadData(search = window.location.search, options = {}) {\n    const requestOptions = {};\n    if (options.signal) {\n      requestOptions.signal = options.signal;\n    }\n\n    const fetchUsers = (nextSearch) =>\n      fetch(`${directoryPath}/users.json${nextSearch}`, requestOptions).then((response) => {\n        if (!response.ok) {\n          throw new Error("Network response was not ok");\n        }\n        return response.json();\n      });\n\n    return Promise.all([\n      fetchUsers(sharedDirectorySearch(search)),\n      fetchUsers(allTabDirectorySearch(search)),\n    ]).then(([directoryData, nextAllTabUserData]) => {\n      userData = directoryData;\n      allTabUserData = nextAllTabUserData;\n      loadedDirectorySearch = search;\n      updateLocationFilterCountBadges();\n      refreshInitialMarkup();\n      handleSearchInput();\n    });\n  }\n\n  function requestDirectoryData(search = window.location.search, options = {}) {\n    const { loadingController = null } = options;\n\n    if (directoryDataRequestController) {\n      directoryDataRequestController.abort();\n    }\n\n    if (directoryDataLoadingController && directoryDataLoadingController !== loadingController) {\n      directoryDataLoadingController.setLoadingState(false);\n    }\n\n    const controller = new AbortController();\n    directoryDataRequestController = controller;\n    directoryDataLoadingController = loadingController;\n\n    if (loadingController) {\n      loadingController.setLoadingState(true);\n    }\n\n    return loadData(search, { signal: controller.signal }).finally(() => {\n      if (directoryDataRequestController === controller) {\n        directoryDataRequestController = null;\n        if (directoryDataLoadingController === loadingController) {\n          if (loadingController) {\n            loadingController.setLoadingState(false);\n          }\n          directoryDataLoadingController = null;\n        }\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  if (searchInput) {\n    searchInput.addEventListener("input", handleSearchInput);\n  }\n\n  if (clearIcon) {\n    clearIcon.addEventListener("click", function () {\n      if (!searchInput) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      searchInput.value = "";\n      clearIcon.style.visibility = "hidden";\n      clearIcon.hidden = true;\n      clearIcon.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");\n      handleSearchInput();\n    });\n  }\n\n  locationFilterControllers.forEach((controller) => {\n    controller.bindEvents();\n  });\n\n  window.activateTab = function (selectedTab) {\n    const targetPanel = document.getElementById(selectedTab.getAttribute("aria-controls"));\n    if (!targetPanel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    tabPanels.forEach((panel) => {\n      panel.hidden = true;\n      panel.style.display = "none";\n      panel.classList.remove("active");\n    });\n\n    tabs.forEach((tab) => {\n      tab.setAttribute("aria-selected", "false");\n      tab.classList.remove("active");\n    });\n\n    selectedTab.setAttribute("aria-selected", "true");\n    selectedTab.classList.add("active");\n    targetPanel.hidden = false;\n    targetPanel.style.display = "block";\n    targetPanel.classList.add("active");\n    selectedTab.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest", inline: "nearest" });\n\n    updateLocationFilterVisibility();\n    updatePlaceholder();\n    handleSearchInput();\n    requestAnimationFrame(updateTabScrollControls);\n  };\n\n  tabs.forEach((tab) => {\n    tab.addEventListener("click", function (event) {\n      const clickedTab = event.currentTarget;\n      const stickyShell = document.querySelector(".directory-sticky-shell");\n      const directoryTabs = document.querySelector(".directory-tabs");\n      const isStickyActiveTabClick =\n        clickedTab.classList.contains("active") &&\n        ((stickyShell && stickyShell.classList.contains("is-sticky")) ||\n          (directoryTabs && directoryTabs.classList.contains("is-sticky")));\n\n      if (isStickyActiveTabClick) {\n        const prefersReducedMotion = window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)")\n          .matches;\n        window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: prefersReducedMotion ? "auto" : "smooth" });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      window.activateTab(clickedTab);\n    });\n    tab.addEventListener("keydown", function (event) {\n      if (event.key !== "ArrowLeft" && event.key !== "ArrowRight") {\n        return;\n      }\n      event.preventDefault();\n      const tabArray = Array.from(tabs);\n      const currentIndex = tabArray.indexOf(event.currentTarget);\n      const direction = event.key === "ArrowRight" ? 1 : -1;\n      const nextIndex = (currentIndex + direction + tabArray.length) % tabArray.length;\n      const nextTab = tabArray[nextIndex];\n      if (nextTab) {\n        window.activateTab(nextTab);\n        nextTab.focus();\n      }\n    });\n  });\n\n  const defaultTab = document.querySelector(".tab.active") || tabs[0];\n  if (defaultTab) {\n    window.activateTab(defaultTab);\n  }\n\n  const stickyShell = document.querySelector(".directory-sticky-shell");\n  const searchBox = document.querySelector(".directory-search");\n  if (directoryTabs || stickyShell) {\n    const updateStickyState = () => {\n      const header = document.querySelector("header");\n      const banner = document.querySelector(".banner");\n      const headerHeight = header ? header.getBoundingClientRect().height : 0;\n      const bannerHeight = banner ? banner.getBoundingClientRect().height : 0;\n      const stickyTop = headerHeight + bannerHeight;\n      const stickyAnchor = stickyShell || directoryTabs;\n\n      if (stickyAnchor) {\n        stickyAnchor.style.setProperty("--directory-sticky-top", `${stickyTop}px`);\n        const stickyAnchorTop = client = <FlaskClient <Flask 'hushline'>>
monkeypatch = <_pytest.monkeypatch.MonkeyPatch object at 0xffff8536c3c0>

    def test_directory_filters_public_records_by_country_and_region_query_params(
        client: FlaskClient, monkeypatch: pytest.MonkeyPatch
    ) -> None:
        california_listing = PublicRecordListing(
            id="public-record-california",
            slug="public-record~california",
            name="California Attorney",
            website="https://california.example",
            description="California whistleblower attorney.",
            city="San Francisco",
            state="CA",
            practice_tags=("Whistleblowing",),
            source_label="Official source",
        )
        new_york_listing = PublicRecordListing(
            id="public-record-new-york",
            slug="public-record~new-york",
            name="New York Attorney",
            website="https://newyork.example",
            description="New York whistleblower attorney.",
            city="New York",
            state="NY",
            practice_tags=("Whistleblowing",),
            source_label="Official source",
        )
        australia_listing = PublicRecordListing(
            id="public-record-australia",
            slug="public-record~australia",
            name="Australia Attorney",
            website="https://australia.example",
            description="Australian whistleblower attorney.",
            city="Sydney",
            state="Australia",
            practice_tags=("Whistleblowing",),
            source_label="Official source",
        )
    
        monkeypatch.setattr("hushline.routes.directory.get_directory_usernames", lambda: ())
        monkeypatch.setattr(
            "hushline.routes.directory.get_public_record_listings",
            lambda: (california_listing, new_york_listing, australia_listing),
        )
        monkeypatch.setattr("hushline.routes.directory.get_globaleaks_directory_listings", lambda: ())
        monkeypatch.setattr("hushline.routes.directory.get_securedrop_directory_listings", lambda: ())
    
        response = client.get(f"{url_for('directory')}?country=US&region=CA")
        assert response.status_code == 200
    
        soup = BeautifulSoup(response.text, "html.parser")
        public_records_panel = soup.find(id="public-records")
        all_panel = soup.find(id="all")
        public_record_count = soup.find(id="public-record-count")
    
        assert public_records_panel is not None
        assert all_panel is not None
        assert public_record_count is not None
        public_records_text = public_records_panel.get_text(" ", strip=True)
        all_text = all_panel.get_text(" ", strip=True)
    
        assert "California Attorney" in public_records_text
        assert "New York Attorney" not in public_records_text
        assert "Australia Attorney" not in public_records_text
        assert "California Attorney" in all_text
>       assert "New York Attorney" not in all_text

View Listing Institute for Public Service Reporting 📰 Newsroom 🤖 Automated The Institute for Public Service Reporting is a professionally staffed newsroom dedicated to civic-minded journalism. We do this while providing hands-on training to university students who will become our community’s next generation of journalists. Our Values: We believe in the Fourth Estate’s vital role in democracy. We value the journalist’s duty to impartially explore and explain complex issues that impact metropolitan Memphis and its citizens. We believe quality local journalism leads to an informed electorate and is among the highest forms of public service. We strive to promote fairness, accountability, equity, and inclusion. We are duty bound to prepare the next generation of journalists in support of this essential mission. WHYY-FM draws a weekly listenership of 485,411 unduplicated listeners (Source: Scarborough 2020, Release 1). Each month, there are an average of 1.9 million unique visitors to WHYY websites with more than 3 million pageviews (Source: Parse.ly, average from July 2019—June 2020). We will invest in high-impact, deeply reported projects that shed light on underreported subjects, hold the powerful to account and serve the public interest. WHY SPOTLIGHTDC? Meanwhile, DC’s government budget has ballooned to $15.5 billion with scant oversight. View Listing Uplift Local 📰 Newsroom 🤖 Automated Uplift Local represents a new kind of participatory journalism that will change how people in our region get news and information. Our work engages communities, rebuilds a sense of place, pushes back on misinformation and diversifies local newsrooms. Unlike many news startups, our model is based on research. We heard from more than 3,600 people in four languages to understand what they need most from local news. Our research found information gaps everywhere, but most acutely from three groups: rural residents, members of distinct cultural communities those who speak a language other than English. Uplift Local offers articles and information in the languages people prefer, expands the pipeline of people providing that information, and solves the last-mile gap between the news people need and their ability to access it wherever and whenever they need it. For many in the Lehigh Valley, it has become increasingly difficult to figure out who is running for office and what they stand for. With reductions in staff at newspapers, voters often rely on campaign mailings, yard signs, social media and word of mouth for their information. For many, Election Day ends up becoming a scramble for information. Armchair was born of this frustration and a desire to provide information that is critical for a robust democracy. We aim to give voters factual information in a nonpartisan way to help them make informed decisions at the polls. Said organization is organized exclusively for charitable, religious, educational and scientific purposes, including for such purposes, the making of distributions to organizations that qualify as exempt organizations described under Section 501(c)3 of the Internal Revenue Code, or corresponding section of any future tax code. The specific purpose of the organization is to produce and distribute quality coverage of issues affecting marginalized and communities of color across the U.S. and globally, to facilitate educational opportunities for journalists of diverse backgrounds, and to develop and test new models of journalism. View Listing Institute for Public Service Reporting 📰 Newsroom 🤖 Automated The Institute for Public Service Reporting is a professionally staffed newsroom dedicated to civic-minded journalism. Our robust, independent investigative reporting and in-depth explanatory journalism aim to promote a vibrant democracy, foster inclusiveness, and enrich the lives of the people of Greater Memphis, including its many underserved communities. We do this while providing hands-on training to university students who will become our community’s next generation of journalists. Our Values: We believe in the Fourth Estate’s vital role in democracy. We value the journalist’s duty to impartially explore and explain complex issues that impact metropolitan Memphis and its citizens. We believe quality local journalism leads to an informed electorate and is among the highest forms of public service. We strive to promote fairness, accountability, equity, and inclusion. We are duty bound to prepare the next generation of journalists in support of this essential mission. We cover the people who make Montclair the engaged and vibrant community we call home. The Local’s professional journalists cover only what happens within the boundaries of Montclair. They are at the public meetings, store openings, and the local sports games. They are out talking to people, looking for the stories that matter. They are passionate about telling the stories of Montclair and living up to the highest standards of journalism. View Listing Plan Philly 📰 Newsroom 🤖 Automated WHYY is the region’s leading public media company and PBS/NPR affiliate, serving the nation’s fourth largest TV market, with 2,758,330 households (Source: Nielsen Local Market Television Estimates, 2020). Each week, 657,248 unique viewers tune into WHYY-TV (Source: Nielsen Weekly Cume Trends FY20 data). WHYY-FM draws a weekly listenership of 485,411 unduplicated listeners (Source: Scarborough 2020, Release 1). Each month, there are an average of 1.9 million unique visitors to WHYY websites with more than 3 million pageviews (Source: Parse.ly, average from July 2019—June 2020). Other online services for accessing WHYY content include podcasts, WHYY Twitter (55,100 followers), WHYY/News Twitter (40,300 followers), WHYY Facebook (65,966 likes, 71,556 follows), WHYY/News Facebook (49,585 likes, 51,616 follows), and YouTube (59,000 subscribers). Each year, WHYY further serves the community through “”off-air”” programs such as community forums, artistic performances, and lectures, and in-school media programs. View Listing Spotlight PA 📰 Newsroom 🤖 Automated Accountability Journalism for Pennsylvania View Listing SpotlightDC 📰 Newsroom 🤖 Automated SPOTLIGHTDC: Capital City Fund for Investigative Journalism OUR MISSION SpotlightDC is an independent, non-profit fund based in Washington, D.C., that supports groundbreaking, original, fair-minded, investigative and explanatory journalism projects focused on the District of Columbia and its surrounding region. We will invest in high-impact, deeply reported projects that shed light on underreported subjects, hold the powerful to account and serve the public interest. WHY SPOTLIGHTDC? We have witnessed an alarming decline of reporting on local matters in the past decade, but funding and focus necessary for long term reporting has all but vanished. Meanwhile, DC’s government budget has ballooned to $15.5 billion with scant oversight. Fairfax County, just over the Potomac River — Virginia’s most populous county and the third wealthiest in the U.S. — is virtually uncovered. View Listing The Northeast News 📰 Newsroom 🤖 Automated Kansas City’s Northeast News is a free weekly print and online publication focused on the gathering and delivery of news that is relevant to the Historic Northeast Kansas City community. View Listing The Yonkers Ledger 📰 Newsroom 🤖 Automated The Yonkers Ledger is dedicated to delivering high-quality unbiased news and cultural education to the city of Yonkers, New York. The Yonkers Ledger is a volunteer-driven group of locals promoting community events, reporting on municipal government, and offering a platform for residents to express their views in a professional and moderated environment. In an effort to join the fight against encroaching “news deserts”, The Ledger has intentionally maintained its status as a 501(c)3 charitable organization and displays no advertising or paid promotions to ensure to their readership that information published on its platform is not slanted by any political or corporate affiliation. View Listing Uplift Local 📰 Newsroom 🤖 Automated Uplift Local represents a new kind of participatory journalism that will change how people in our region get news and information. Our work engages communities, rebuilds a sense of place, pushes back on misinformation and diversifies local newsrooms. Unlike many news startups, our model is based on research. We heard from more than 3,600 people in four languages to understand what they need most from local news. Our research found information gaps everywhere, but most acutely from three groups: rural residents, members of distinct cultural communities those who speak a language other than English. Uplift Local offers articles and information in the languages people prefer, expands the pipeline of people providing that information, and solves the last-mile gap between the news people need and their ability to access it wherever and whenever they need it. Each week, 657,248 unique viewers tune into WHYY-TV (Source: Nielsen Weekly Cume Trends FY20 data). WHYY-FM draws a weekly listenership of 485,411 unduplicated listeners (Source: Scarborough 2020, Release 1). Each month, there are an average of 1.9 million unique visitors to WHYY websites with more than 3 million pageviews (Source: Parse.ly, average from July 2019—June 2020). Other online services for accessing WHYY content include podcasts, WHYY Twitter (55,100 followers), WHYY/News Twitter (40,300 followers), WHYY Facebook (65,966 likes, 71,556 follows), WHYY/News Facebook (49,585 likes, 51,616 follows), and YouTube (59,000 subscribers). Each year, WHYY further serves the community through “”off-air”” programs such as community forums, artistic performances, and lectures, and in-school media programs. introMarkup = "", showEmptyMessage = true } = {},\n  ) {\n    panel.innerHTML = introMarkup;\n\n    if (users.length === 0) {\n      if (showEmptyMessage) {\n        panel.insertAdjacentHTML(\n          "beforeend",\n          \'<p class="empty-message"><span class="emoji-message">🫥</span><br>No users found.</p>\',\n        );\n      }\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const realUsers = users.filter(\n      (user) =>\n        !user.is_public_record &&\n        !user.is_globaleaks &&\n        !user.is_newsroom &&\n        !user.is_securedrop,\n    );\n    const withPgp = realUsers.filter((user) => user.has_pgp_key);\n    const infoOnly = realUsers.filter((user) => !user.has_pgp_key);\n\n    if (tab === "all") {\n      appendSection(panel, "", sortAllTabUsers(users), query, tab);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === "verified") {\n      appendSection(panel, "", withPgp, query, tab);\n      appendSection(panel, "📇 Info-Only Accounts", infoOnly, query, tab);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    appendSection(panel, "", users, query, tab);\n  }\n\n  function displayUsers(users, query) {\n    const panel = activePanel();\n    const tab = activeTabName();\n    if (!panel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    renderPanelContent(panel, users, query, tab);\n  }\n\n  function panelIntroMarkup(panelId) {\n    return document.getElementById(panelId)?.querySelector(".dirMeta")?.outerHTML || "";\n  }\n\n  function buildDefaultPanelMarkup(tab) {\n    const panel = document.createElement("div");\n    const introMarkup = panelIntroMarkup(tab);\n    const showEmptyMessage = tab !== "public-records";\n\n    renderPanelContent(panel, filterUsers("", tab), "", tab, {\n      introMarkup,\n      showEmptyMessage,\n    });\n\n    return panel.innerHTML;\n  }\n\n  function refreshInitialMarkup() {\n    ["public-records", "newsrooms", "all"].forEach((panelId) => {\n      if (document.getElementById(panelId)) {\n        initialMarkup.set(panelId, buildDefaultPanelMarkup(panelId));\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  function handleSearchInput() {\n    const query = searchInput.value.trim();\n    const panel = activePanel();\n    const currentScopeLabel = scopeLabel();\n    const hasQuery = query.length > 0;\n\n    if (clearIcon) {\n      clearIcon.style.visibility = hasQuery ? "visible" : "hidden";\n      clearIcon.hidden = !hasQuery;\n      clearIcon.setAttribute("aria-hidden", hasQuery ? "false" : "true");\n    }\n\n    if (query.length === 0) {\n      if (panel && initialMarkup.has(panel.id)) {\n        panel.innerHTML = initialMarkup.get(panel.id);\n      }\n      if (hasRenderedSearch) {\n        setSearchStatus(`Showing all ${currentScopeLabel}.`);\n      }\n      hasRenderedSearch = false;\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const filteredUsers = filterUsers(query);\n    displayUsers(filteredUsers, query);\n    setSearchStatus(\n      filteredUsers.length === 1\n        ? `Found 1 ${currentScopeLabel.slice(0, -1)} matching "${query}".`\n        : `Found ${filteredUsers.length} ${currentScopeLabel} matching "${query}".`,\n    );\n    hasRenderedSearch = true;\n  }\n\n  function removeSearchParams(search, paramNames) {\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(search);\n    paramNames.forEach((paramName) => {\n      params.delete(paramName);\n    });\n    const nextSearch = params.toString();\n    return nextSearch ? `?${nextSearch}` : "";\n  }\n\n  function sharedDirectorySearch(search) {\n    return removeSearchParams(search, ["all_country", "all_region", "all_listing_type"]);\n  }\n\n  function allTabDirectorySearch(search) {\n    return removeSearchParams(search, [\n      "country",\n      "region",\n      "newsroom_country",\n      "newsroom_region",\n    ]);\n  }\n\n  function createLocationFilterController(config) {\n    const controller = {\n      ...config,\n      loading: false,\n      metadata: { countries: [], regions: {} },\n      metadataRequest: null,\n    };\n\n    if (!controller.countryFilter || !controller.regionFilter) {\n      return null;\n    }\n\n    controller.hasActiveFilters = function () {\n      return Boolean(\n        controller.countryFilter.value.trim() ||\n          controller.regionFilter.value.trim() ||\n          controller.listingTypeFilter?.value.trim(),\n      );\n    };\n\n    controller.updateToggle = function () {\n      if (!controller.toggle || !controller.panel) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const isExpanded = !controller.panel.hidden;\n      controller.toggle.setAttribute("aria-expanded", isExpanded ? "true" : "false");\n      controller.toggle.textContent = isExpanded ? "Hide Filters" : "Show Filters";\n    };\n\n    controller.updateVisibility = function () {\n      const tabIsActive = activeTabName() === controller.tabName;\n\n      if (controller.toggleShell) {\n        controller.toggleShell.hidden = !tabIsActive;\n      }\n\n      if (controller.panelShell) {\n        controller.panelShell.hidden = !tabIsActive;\n      }\n    };\n\n    controller.resultsCount = function () {\n      return filterUsers("", controller.tabName).length;\n    };\n\n    controller.updateCountBadge = function () {\n      if (controller.countBadge) {\n        controller.countBadge.textContent = controller.resultsCount().toString();\n      }\n    };\n\n    controller.buildSearch = function () {\n      const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\n      const country = controller.countryFilter.value.trim();\n      const region = controller.regionFilter.value.trim();\n\n      if (country) {\n        params.set(controller.countryParam, country);\n      } else {\n        params.delete(controller.countryParam);\n      }\n\n      if (region) {\n        params.set(controller.regionParam, region);\n      } else {\n        params.delete(controller.regionParam);\n      }\n\n      if (controller.listingTypeParam) {\n        const listingType = controller.listingTypeFilter?.value.trim() || "";\n        if (listingType) {\n          params.set(controller.listingTypeParam, listingType);\n        } else {\n          params.delete(controller.listingTypeParam);\n        }\n      }\n\n      const nextSearch = params.toString();\n      return nextSearch ? `?${nextSearch}` : "";\n    };\n\n    controller.setSelectExpandedState = function (select, isExpanded) {\n      if (!select) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      select.dataset.showSelectedCount = isExpanded ? "true" : "false";\n    };\n\n    controller.setSelectOpenState = function (select, isOpen) {\n      if (!select) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      select.classList.toggle("select-open", isOpen);\n    };\n\n    controller.updateClearVisibility = function () {\n      if (!controller.panel) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const resetActions = controller.panel.querySelector(`#${controller.actionsId}`);\n      if (!resetActions) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      resetActions.hidden = !controller.hasActiveFilters();\n    };\n\n    controller.updateCountryLabels = function () {\n      const selectedCountry = controller.countryFilter.value;\n      const showSelectedCount = controller.countryFilter.dataset.showSelectedCount === "true";\n\n      Array.from(controller.countryFilter.options).forEach((option) => {\n        if (!option.value) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        const country = Array.isArray(controller.metadata.countries)\n          ? controller.metadata.countries.find((item) => item.code === option.value)\n          : null;\n        if (!country) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        option.textContent =\n          option.value === selectedCountry && !showSelectedCount\n            ? country.label\n            : `${country.label} (${country.count})`;\n      });\n    };\n\n    controller.updateListingTypeLabels = function () {\n      if (!controller.listingTypeFilter) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const selectedListingType = controller.listingTypeFilter.value;\n      const showSelectedCount = controller.listingTypeFilter.dataset.showSelectedCount === "true";\n\n      Array.from(controller.listingTypeFilter.options).forEach((option) => {\n        if (!option.value) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        const listingType = Array.isArray(controller.metadata.listing_types)\n          ? controller.metadata.listing_types.find((item) => item.code === option.value)\n          : null;\n        if (!listingType) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        option.textContent =\n          option.value === selectedListingType && !showSelectedCount\n            ? listingType.label\n            : `${listingType.label} (${listingType.count})`;\n      });\n    };\n\n    controller.inferredCountryForRegionCode = function (regionCode) {\n      if (!regionCode) {\n        return "";\n      }\n\n      const normalizedRegionCode = regionCode.trim().toLowerCase();\n      const regionsByCountry =\n        controller.metadata.regions && typeof controller.metadata.regions === "object"\n          ? controller.metadata.regions\n          : {};\n\n      for (const [countryName, countryRegions] of Object.entries(regionsByCountry)) {\n        if (!Array.isArray(countryRegions)) {\n          continue;\n        }\n\n        const matchingRegion = countryRegions.find(\n          (region) => String(region.code).trim().toLowerCase() === normalizedRegionCode,\n        );\n        if (matchingRegion) {\n          return countryName;\n        }\n      }\n\n      return "";\n    };\n\n    controller.updateRegionOptions = function () {\n      const selectedCountry = controller.countryFilter.value;\n      const selectedRegion = controller.regionFilter.value;\n      const showSelectedCount = controller.regionFilter.dataset.showSelectedCount === "true";\n      const regionsByCountry =\n        controller.metadata.regions && typeof controller.metadata.regions === "object"\n          ? controller.metadata.regions\n          : {};\n      const availableRegions = selectedCountry\n        ? Array.isArray(regionsByCountry[selectedCountry])\n          ? regionsByCountry[selectedCountry]\n          : []\n        : Object.values(regionsByCountry).flatMap((countryRegions) =>\n            Array.isArray(countryRegions) ? countryRegions : [],\n          );\n\n      controller.regionFilter.innerHTML = \'<option value="">All</option>\';\n\n      if (selectedCountry) {\n        availableRegions.forEach((region) => {\n          const option = document.createElement("option");\n          option.value = region.code;\n          option.textContent =\n            region.code === selectedRegion && !showSelectedCount\n              ? region.label\n              : `${region.label} (${region.count})`;\n          if (region.code === selectedRegion) {\n            option.selected = true;\n          }\n          controller.regionFilter.appendChild(option);\n        });\n      } else {\n        Object.entries(regionsByCountry).forEach(([countryName, countryRegions]) => {\n          if (!Array.isArray(countryRegions) || !countryRegions.length) {\n            return;\n          }\n\n          const optgroup = document.createElement("optgroup");\n          optgroup.label = countryName;\n\n          countryRegions.forEach((region) => {\n            const option = document.createElement("option");\n            option.value = region.code;\n            option.textContent =\n              region.code === selectedRegion && !showSelectedCount\n                ? region.label\n                : `${region.label} (${region.count})`;\n            if (region.code === selectedRegion) {\n              option.selected = true;\n            }\n            optgroup.appendChild(option);\n          });\n\n          controller.regionFilter.appendChild(optgroup);\n        });\n      }\n\n      if (!availableRegions.some((region) => region.code === selectedRegion)) {\n        controller.regionFilter.value = "";\n      }\n\n      const disabledByCountry = !availableRegions.length;\n      controller.regionFilter.dataset.disabledByCountry = disabledByCountry ? "true" : "false";\n      controller.regionFilter.disabled = controller.loading || disabledByCountry;\n      controller.updateClearVisibility();\n    };\n\n    controller.updateSelectExpandedLabels = function (isExpanded) {\n      controller.setSelectExpandedState(controller.countryFilter, isExpanded);\n      controller.setSelectExpandedState(controller.regionFilter, isExpanded);\n      controller.setSelectExpandedState(controller.listingTypeFilter, isExpanded);\n      controller.updateCountryLabels();\n      controller.updateRegionOptions();\n      controller.updateListingTypeLabels();\n    };\n\n    controller.applyFromSearch = function (search) {\n      const params = new URLSearchParams(search);\n      controller.countryFilter.value = normalizedCountryFilterValue(\n        params.get(controller.countryParam),\n      );\n      controller.regionFilter.value = params.get(controller.regionParam) || "";\n      if (controller.listingTypeFilter && controller.listingTypeParam) {\n        controller.listingTypeFilter.value = params.get(controller.listingTypeParam) || "";\n      }\n      if (!controller.countryFilter.value && controller.regionFilter.value) {\n        controller.countryFilter.value = controller.inferredCountryForRegionCode(\n          controller.regionFilter.value,\n        );\n      }\n      controller.updateCountryLabels();\n      controller.updateRegionOptions();\n      controller.updateListingTypeLabels();\n\n      if (controller.panel) {\n        controller.panel.hidden = !controller.hasActiveFilters();\n        controller.updateToggle();\n        controller.updateClearVisibility();\n      }\n    };\n\n    controller.setLoadingState = function (isLoading) {\n      if (!controller.panel) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      controller.loading = isLoading;\n      controller.panel.setAttribute("aria-busy", isLoading ? "true" : "false");\n      controller.countryFilter.disabled = isLoading;\n\n      const disabledByCountry = controller.regionFilter.dataset.disabledByCountry === "true";\n      controller.regionFilter.disabled = isLoading || disabledByCountry;\n      if (controller.listingTypeFilter) {\n        controller.listingTypeFilter.disabled = isLoading;\n      }\n\n      const resetLink = controller.panel.querySelector("a");\n      if (resetLink) {\n        resetLink.setAttribute("aria-disabled", isLoading ? "true" : "false");\n        resetLink.tabIndex = isLoading ? -1 : 0;\n      }\n    };\n\n    controller.ensureMetadata = function () {\n      if (controller.metadataRequest) {\n        return controller.metadataRequest;\n      }\n\n      controller.metadataRequest = fetch(`${directoryPath}/${controller.metadataPath}`)\n        .then((response) => {\n          if (!response.ok) {\n            throw new Error("Network response was not ok");\n          }\n          return response.json();\n        })\n        .then((data) => {\n          controller.metadata = data;\n          controller.applyFromSearch(window.location.search);\n          return data;\n        })\n        .catch((error) => {\n          controller.metadataRequest = null;\n          console.error(`Failed to load ${controller.resultsLabelPlural} filter metadata:`, error);\n          return null;\n        });\n\n      return controller.metadataRequest;\n    };\n\n    controller.refreshResults = async function () {\n      if (!controller.panel) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const nextSearch = controller.buildSearch();\n      if (controller.loading || loadedDirectorySearch === nextSearch) {\n        return;\n      }\n      setSearchStatus(`Updating ${controller.resultsLabelPlural} results.`);\n      setDirectoryUrl(nextSearch);\n\n      try {\n        await requestDirectoryData(nextSearch, { loadingController: controller });\n        if (!searchInput.value.trim()) {\n          const count = controller.resultsCount();\n          setSearchStatus(\n            count === 1\n              ? `Showing 1 matching ${controller.resultsLabelSingular}.`\n              : `Showing ${count} matching ${controller.resultsLabelPlural}.`,\n          );\n        }\n      } catch (error) {\n        if (error.name === "AbortError") {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        setDirectoryUrl(loadedDirectorySearch);\n        controller.applyFromSearch(loadedDirectorySearch);\n        setSearchStatus(`Unable to update ${controller.resultsLabelPlural} results.`);\n        console.error(`Failed to update ${controller.resultsLabelPlural} results:`, error);\n      }\n    };\n\n    controller.bindEvents = function () {\n      if (controller.toggle && controller.panel) {\n        controller.updateToggle();\n        controller.toggle.addEventListener("click", function () {\n          controller.panel.hidden = !controller.panel.hidden;\n          controller.updateToggle();\n        });\n      }\n\n      if (!controller.panel) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const resetLink = controller.panel.querySelector("a");\n      const syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen = function (event) {\n        if (\n          event.type === "keydown" &&\n          event.key !== "ArrowDown" &&\n          event.key !== "ArrowUp" &&\n          event.key !== "Enter" &&\n          event.key !== " "\n        ) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        controller.updateSelectExpandedLabels(true);\n      };\n      const syncExpandedLabelsOnClose = function () {\n        controller.updateSelectExpandedLabels(false);\n      };\n      const syncChevronOnOpen = function (event) {\n        if (\n          event.type === "keydown" &&\n          event.key !== "ArrowDown" &&\n          event.key !== "ArrowUp" &&\n          event.key !== "Enter" &&\n          event.key !== " "\n        ) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        controller.setSelectOpenState(event.currentTarget, true);\n      };\n      const syncChevronOnClose = function (event) {\n        controller.setSelectOpenState(event.currentTarget, false);\n      };\n\n      controller.countryFilter.addEventListener("change", async function () {\n        await controller.ensureMetadata();\n        controller.updateCountryLabels();\n        controller.updateRegionOptions();\n        syncExpandedLabelsOnClose();\n        controller.setSelectOpenState(controller.countryFilter, false);\n        void controller.refreshResults();\n      });\n\n      controller.regionFilter.addEventListener("change", function () {\n        if (!controller.countryFilter.value && controller.regionFilter.value) {\n          controller.countryFilter.value = controller.inferredCountryForRegionCode(\n            controller.regionFilter.value,\n          );\n          controller.updateRegionOptions();\n        }\n        controller.updateCountryLabels();\n        controller.updateClearVisibility();\n        syncExpandedLabelsOnClose();\n        controller.setSelectOpenState(controller.regionFilter, false);\n        void controller.refreshResults();\n      });\n\n      if (controller.listingTypeFilter) {\n        controller.listingTypeFilter.addEventListener("change", async function () {\n          await controller.ensureMetadata();\n          controller.updateListingTypeLabels();\n          controller.updateClearVisibility();\n          syncExpandedLabelsOnClose();\n          controller.setSelectOpenState(controller.listingTypeFilter, false);\n          void controller.refreshResults();\n        });\n      }\n\n      [controller.countryFilter, controller.regionFilter, controller.listingTypeFilter]\n        .filter(Boolean)\n        .forEach((select) => {\n          select.addEventListener("focus", syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen);\n          select.addEventListener("pointerdown", syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen);\n          select.addEventListener("keydown", syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen);\n          select.addEventListener("blur", syncExpandedLabelsOnClose);\n          select.addEventListener("pointerdown", syncChevronOnOpen);\n          select.addEventListener("keydown", syncChevronOnOpen);\n          select.addEventListener("blur", syncChevronOnClose);\n        });\n\n      if (resetLink) {\n        resetLink.addEventListener("click", function (event) {\n          event.preventDefault();\n          if (controller.loading) {\n            return;\n          }\n\n          controller.countryFilter.value = "";\n          controller.regionFilter.value = "";\n          if (controller.listingTypeFilter) {\n            controller.listingTypeFilter.value = "";\n          }\n          controller.updateCountryLabels();\n          controller.updateRegionOptions();\n          controller.updateListingTypeLabels();\n          syncExpandedLabelsOnClose();\n          void controller.refreshResults();\n        });\n      }\n    };\n\n    return controller;\n  }\n\n  const locationFilterControllers = [\n    createLocationFilterController({\n      tabName: "all",\n      toggleShell: allFiltersToggleShell,\n      panelShell: allFiltersPanelShell,\n      toggle: allFiltersToggle,\n      panel: allFiltersPanel,\n      countryFilter: allCountryFilter,\n      regionFilter: allRegionFilter,\n      listingTypeFilter: allListingTypeFilter,\n      actionsId: "all-filters-actions",\n      metadataPath: "all-filters.json",\n      countryParam: "all_country",\n      regionParam: "all_region",\n      listingTypeParam: "all_listing_type",\n      resultsLabelSingular: "directory entry",\n      resultsLabelPlural: "directory entries",\n    }),\n    createLocationFilterController({\n      tabName: "public-records",\n      countBadge: publicRecordCountBadge,\n      toggleShell: attorneyFiltersToggleShell,\n      panelShell: attorneyFiltersPanelShell,\n      toggle: attorneyFiltersToggle,\n      panel: attorneyFiltersPanel,\n      countryFilter: attorneyCountryFilter,\n      regionFilter: attorneyRegionFilter,\n      actionsId: "attorney-filters-actions",\n      metadataPath: "attorney-filters.json",\n      countryParam: "country",\n      regionParam: "region",\n      resultsLabelSingular: "attorney",\n      resultsLabelPlural: "attorneys",\n    }),\n    createLocationFilterController({\n      tabName: "newsrooms",\n      countBadge: newsroomCountBadge,\n      toggleShell: newsroomFiltersToggleShell,\n      panelShell: newsroomFiltersPanelShell,\n      toggle: newsroomFiltersToggle,\n      panel: newsroomFiltersPanel,\n      countryFilter: newsroomCountryFilter,\n      regionFilter: newsroomRegionFilter,\n      actionsId: "newsroom-filters-actions",\n      metadataPath: "newsroom-filters.json",\n      countryParam: "newsroom_country",\n      regionParam: "newsroom_region",\n      resultsLabelSingular: "newsroom",\n      resultsLabelPlural: "newsrooms",\n    }),\n  ].filter(Boolean);\n\n  function updateLocationFilterVisibility() {\n    locationFilterControllers.forEach((controller) => {\n      controller.updateVisibility();\n    });\n  }\n\n  function updateLocationFilterCountBadges() {\n    locationFilterControllers.forEach((controller) => {\n      controller.updateCountBadge();\n    });\n  }\n\n  function setDirectoryUrl(search) {\n    window.history.replaceState(\n      {},\n      "",\n      `${window.location.pathname}${search}${window.location.hash}`,\n    );\n  }\n\n  function loadData(search = window.location.search, options = {}) {\n    const requestOptions = {};\n    if (options.signal) {\n      requestOptions.signal = options.signal;\n    }\n\n    const fetchUsers = (nextSearch) =>\n      fetch(`${directoryPath}/users.json${nextSearch}`, requestOptions).then((response) => {\n        if (!response.ok) {\n          throw new Error("Network response was not ok");\n        }\n        return response.json();\n      });\n\n    return Promise.all([\n      fetchUsers(sharedDirectorySearch(search)),\n      fetchUsers(allTabDirectorySearch(search)),\n    ]).then(([directoryData, nextAllTabUserData]) => {\n      userData = directoryData;\n      allTabUserData = nextAllTabUserData;\n      loadedDirectorySearch = search;\n      updateLocationFilterCountBadges();\n      refreshInitialMarkup();\n      handleSearchInput();\n    });\n  }\n\n  function requestDirectoryData(search = window.location.search, options = {}) {\n    const { loadingController = null } = options;\n\n    if (directoryDataRequestController) {\n      directoryDataRequestController.abort();\n    }\n\n    if (directoryDataLoadingController && directoryDataLoadingController !== loadingController) {\n      directoryDataLoadingController.setLoadingState(false);\n    }\n\n    const controller = new AbortController();\n    directoryDataRequestController = controller;\n    directoryDataLoadingController = loadingController;\n\n    if (loadingController) {\n      loadingController.setLoadingState(true);\n    }\n\n    return loadData(search, { signal: controller.signal }).finally(() => {\n      if (directoryDataRequestController === controller) {\n        directoryDataRequestController = null;\n        if (directoryDataLoadingController === loadingController) {\n          if (loadingController) {\n            loadingController.setLoadingState(false);\n          }\n          directoryDataLoadingController = null;\n        }\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  if (searchInput) {\n    searchInput.addEventListener("input", handleSearchInput);\n  }\n\n  if (clearIcon) {\n    clearIcon.addEventListener("click", function () {\n      if (!searchInput) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      searchInput.value = "";\n      clearIcon.style.visibility = "hidden";\n      clearIcon.hidden = true;\n      clearIcon.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");\n      handleSearchInput();\n    });\n  }\n\n  locationFilterControllers.forEach((controller) => {\n    controller.bindEvents();\n  });\n\n  window.activateTab = function (selectedTab) {\n    const targetPanel = document.getElementById(selectedTab.getAttribute("aria-controls"));\n    if (!targetPanel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    tabPanels.forEach((panel) => {\n      panel.hidden = true;\n      panel.style.display = "none";\n      panel.classList.remove("active");\n    });\n\n    tabs.forEach((tab) => {\n      tab.setAttribute("aria-selected", "false");\n      tab.classList.remove("active");\n    });\n\n    selectedTab.setAttribute("aria-selected", "true");\n    selectedTab.classList.add("active");\n    targetPanel.hidden = false;\n    targetPanel.style.display = "block";\n    targetPanel.classList.add("active");\n    selectedTab.scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest", inline: "nearest" });\n\n    updateLocationFilterVisibility();\n    updatePlaceholder();\n    handleSearchInput();\n    requestAnimationFrame(updateTabScrollControls);\n  };\n\n  tabs.forEach((tab) => {\n    tab.addEventListener("click", function (event) {\n      const clickedTab = event.currentTarget;\n      const stickyShell = document.querySelector(".directory-sticky-shell");\n      const directoryTabs = document.querySelector(".directory-tabs");\n      const isStickyActiveTabClick =\n        clickedTab.classList.contains("active") &&\n        ((stickyShell && stickyShell.classList.contains("is-sticky")) ||\n          (directoryTabs && directoryTabs.classList.contains("is-sticky")));\n\n      if (isStickyActiveTabClick) {\n        const prefersReducedMotion = window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)")\n          .matches;\n        window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: prefersReducedMotion ? "auto" : "smooth" });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      window.activateTab(clickedTab);\n    });\n    tab.addEventListener("keydown", function (event) {\n      if (event.key !== "ArrowLeft" && event.key !== "ArrowRight") {\n        return;\n      }\n      event.preventDefault();\n      const tabArray = Array.from(tabs);\n      const currentIndex = tabArray.indexOf(event.currentTarget);\n      const direction = event.key === "ArrowRight" ? 1 : -1;\n      const nextIndex = (currentIndex + direction + tabArray.length) % tabArray.length;\n      const nextTab = tabArray[nextIndex];\n      if (nextTab) {\n        window.activateTab(nextTab);\n        nextTab.focus();\n      }\n    });\n  });\n\n  const defaultTab = document.querySelector(".tab.active") || tabs[0];\n  if (defaultTab) {\n    window.activateTab(defaultTab);\n  }\n\n  const stickyShell = document.querySelector(".directory-sticky-shell");\n  const searchBox = document.querySelector(".directory-search");\n  if (directoryTabs || stickyShell) {\n    const updateStickyState = () => {\n      const header = document.querySelector("header");\n      const banner = document.querySelector(".banner");\n      const headerHeight = header ? header.getBoundingClientRect().height : 0;\n      const bannerHeight = banner ? banner.getBoundingClientRect().height : 0;\n      const stickyTop = headerHeight + bannerHeight;\n      const stickyAnchor = stickyShell || directoryTabs;\n\n      if (stickyAnchor) {\n        stickyAnchor.style.setProperty("--directory-sticky-top", `${stickyTop}px`);\n        const stickyAnchorTop = stickyAnchor.getBoundingClientRect().top;\n        const isSticky = window.scrollY > stickyTop + 1 && stickyAnchorTop <= stickyTop;\n        stickyShell?.classList.toggle("is-sticky", isSticky);\n        directoryTabs?.classList.toggle("is-sticky", isSticky);\n        searchBox?.classList.toggle("is-sticky", isSticky);\n      }\n    };\n\n    updateStickyState();\n    window.addEventListener("scroll", updateStickyState, { passive: true });\n    window.addEventListener("hashchange", () => {\n      requestAnimationFrame(updateStickyState);\n    });\n    window.addEventListener("resize", updateStickyState);\n  }\n\n  if (directoryTabList && scrollLeftButton && scrollRightButton) {\n    scrollLeftButton.addEventListener("click", function () {\n      scrollDirectoryTabs(-1);\n    });\n\n    scrollRightButton.addEventListener("click", function () {\n      scrollDirectoryTabs(1);\n    });\n\n    directoryTabList.addEventListener("scroll", updateTabScrollControls, { passive: true });\n    window.addEventListener("resize", updateTabScrollControls);\n\n    if (typeof desktopTabScrollMediaQuery.addEventListener === "function") {\n      desktopTabScrollMediaQuery.addEventListener("change", updateTabScrollControls);\n    } else if (typeof desktopTabScrollMediaQuery.addListener === "function") {\n View Listing Institute for Public Service Reporting 📰 Newsroom 🤖 Automated The Institute for Public Service Reporting is a professionally staffed newsroom dedicated to civic-minded journalism. Our robust, independent investigative reporting and in-depth explanatory journalism aim to promote a vibrant democracy, foster inclusiveness, and enrich the lives of the people of Greater Memphis, including its many underserved communities. We do this while providing hands-on training to university students who will become our community’s next generation of journalists. Our Values: We believe in the Fourth Estate’s vital role in democracy. We value the journalist’s duty to impartially explore and explain complex issues that impact metropolitan Memphis and its citizens. We believe quality local journalism leads to an informed electorate and is among the highest forms of public service. We strive to promote fairness, accountability, equity, and inclusion. We are duty bound to prepare the next generation of journalists in support of this essential mission. View Listing Plan Philly 📰 Newsroom 🤖 Automated WHYY is the region’s leading public media company and PBS/NPR affiliate, serving the nation’s fourth largest TV market, with 2,758,330 households (Source: Nielsen Local Market Television Estimates, 2020). Each week, 657,248 unique viewers tune into WHYY-TV (Source: Nielsen Weekly Cume Trends FY20 data). WHYY-FM draws a weekly listenership of 485,411 unduplicated listeners (Source: Scarborough 2020, Release 1). Each month, there are an average of 1.9 million unique visitors to WHYY websites with more than 3 million pageviews (Source: Parse.ly, average from July 2019—June 2020). Other online services for accessing WHYY content include podcasts, WHYY Twitter (55,100 followers), WHYY/News Twitter (40,300 followers), WHYY Facebook (65,966 likes, 71,556 follows), WHYY/News Facebook (49,585 likes, 51,616 follows), and YouTube (59,000 subscribers). Each year, WHYY further serves the community through “”off-air”” programs such as community forums, artistic performances, and lectures, and in-school media programs. We will invest in high-impact, deeply reported projects that shed light on underreported subjects, hold the powerful to account and serve the public interest. WHY SPOTLIGHTDC? We have witnessed an alarming decline of reporting on local matters in the past decade, but funding and focus necessary for long term reporting has all but vanished. Meanwhile, DC’s government budget has ballooned to $15.5 billion with scant oversight. Fairfax County, just over the Potomac River — Virginia’s most populous county and the third wealthiest in the U.S. — is virtually uncovered. View Listing Uplift Local 📰 Newsroom 🤖 Automated Uplift Local represents a new kind of participatory journalism that will change how people in our region get news and information. Our work engages communities, rebuilds a sense of place, pushes back on misinformation and diversifies local newsrooms. Unlike many news startups, our model is based on research. We heard from more than 3,600 people in four languages to understand what they need most from local news. Our research found information gaps everywhere, but most acutely from three groups: rural residents, members of distinct cultural communities those who speak a language other than English. Uplift Local offers articles and information in the languages people prefer, expands the pipeline of people providing that information, and solves the last-mile gap between the news people need and their ability to access it wherever and whenever they need it. For many in the Lehigh Valley, it has become increasingly difficult to figure out who is running for office and what they stand for. With reductions in staff at newspapers, voters often rely on campaign mailings, yard signs, social media and word of mouth for their information. For many, Election Day ends up becoming a scramble for information. Armchair was born of this frustration and a desire to provide information that is critical for a robust democracy. We aim to give voters factual information in a nonpartisan way to help them make informed decisions at the polls. View Listing Institute for Public Service Reporting 📰 Newsroom 🤖 Automated The Institute for Public Service Reporting is a professionally staffed newsroom dedicated to civic-minded journalism. Our robust, independent investigative reporting and in-depth explanatory journalism aim to promote a vibrant democracy, foster inclusiveness, and enrich the lives of the people of Greater Memphis, including its many underserved communities. We do this while providing hands-on training to university students who will become our community’s next generation of journalists. Our Values: We believe in the Fourth Estate’s vital role in democracy. We value the journalist’s duty to impartially explore and explain complex issues that impact metropolitan Memphis and its citizens. We believe quality local journalism leads to an informed electorate and is among the highest forms of public service. We strive to promote fairness, accountability, equity, and inclusion. We are duty bound to prepare the next generation of journalists in support of this essential mission. View Listing Plan Philly 📰 Newsroom 🤖 Automated WHYY is the region’s leading public media company and PBS/NPR affiliate, serving the nation’s fourth largest TV market, with 2,758,330 households (Source: Nielsen Local Market Television Estimates, 2020). Each week, 657,248 unique viewers tune into WHYY-TV (Source: Nielsen Weekly Cume Trends FY20 data). WHYY-FM draws a weekly listenership of 485,411 unduplicated listeners (Source: Scarborough 2020, Release 1). Each month, there are an average of 1.9 million unique visitors to WHYY websites with more than 3 million pageviews (Source: Parse.ly, average from July 2019—June 2020). Other online services for accessing WHYY content include podcasts, WHYY Twitter (55,100 followers), WHYY/News Twitter (40,300 followers), WHYY Facebook (65,966 likes, 71,556 follows), WHYY/News Facebook (49,585 likes, 51,616 follows), and YouTube (59,000 subscribers). Each year, WHYY further serves the community through “”off-air”” programs such as community forums, artistic performances, and lectures, and in-school media programs.
